Student ID Card Usage Information

Kadir Has University students have been given “student identification cards,” which are also used for access through turnstiles at the entrance of campuses.

Education starts with the student ID card, and the same card is used until graduation.

Students should have their ID cards with them at all times and should not allow anyone to use their identification cards.

Student ID cards should be kept away from magnetic media and should be kept well.

If a student ID card is broken, lost, stolen, or damaged, it is necessary to apply to the Security Affairs Office.

If a student ID card is broken, lost, stolen, or damaged, the renewal fee is 25 TL.

The responsibility belongs to the students who lost or got their ID cards stolen to go to the nearest Police Station to inform and have a proceeding documented.
